      HintName: Product.g.cs,
      Content:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class Product
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Determines whether this Product is equal to another based on their values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override bool EqualsCore(Product other)
        {
            // Properties are compared in priority order (highest to lowest):
            // Priority 10: Id
            // Priority 5: Name
            // Priority 1: Price

            if (!EqualityComparer<string>.Default.Equals(Id, other.Id)) return false;
            if (!EqualityComparer<string>.Default.Equals(Name, other.Name)) return false;
            if (!Price.Equals(other.Price)) return false;
            return true;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a hash code for this value object's values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override int GetHashCodeCore()
        {
            var hashCode = new HashCode();

            hashCode.Add(Id);
            hashCode.Add(Name);
            hashCode.Add(Price);

            return hashCode.ToHashCode();
        }

    }
}

    }
  ]
}
